zh.Worthington, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃辛頓
zh.Ormskirk, West Lancashire, Lancashire, E: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh De Worthington於1238年出生在英國藍卡爾沃辛頓時，他的父親William De Worthington18歲，母親Elene De Charnock18歲。他於1250年之前與Denise de Halsall在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1297年在英國藍卡爾沃辛頓享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾。

zh-hans.Ormskirk, West Lancashire, Lancashire, E: 英国英格兰藍卡爾奧姆斯吉可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh De Worthington于1238年出生在英国藍卡爾沃辛頓时，他的父亲William De Worthington18岁，母亲Elene De Charnock18岁。他于1250年之前与Denise de Halsall在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1297年在英国藍卡爾沃辛頓享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Worthington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire, Cheshire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and Leicestershire named Worthington. The placenames probably derive from an Old English personal name Weorth + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
History: Nicholas Worthington emigrated from England to Old Saybrook, CT, c. 1650.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh De Worthington was born in 1238, in Worthington, Lancashire, England, his father, William De Worthington, was 18 and his mother, Elene De Charnock, was 18. He married Denise de Halsall before 1250, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died in 1297, in Worthington, Lancashire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh De Worthington est né en 1238, à Worthington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William De Worthington, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elene De Charnock, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Denise de Halsall avant 1250, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé en 1297, à Worthington, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh De Worthington 1238 in Worthington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William De Worthington 18 und seine Mutter Elene De Charnock 18. Er hat vor 1250 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Denise de Halsall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Worthington, Lancashire, England und wurde in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh De Worthington è nato il nel 1238 nel Worthington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William De Worthington, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elene De Charnock, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Denise de Halsall prima del 1250, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì nel 1297, nel Worthington, Lancashire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh De Worthingtonが1238年にイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスイントンで生まれた時，父William De Worthingtonは18歳，母Elene De Charnockは18歳であった。1250年以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでDenise de Halsallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1297年にイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスイントンで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh De Worthington(이)가 1238년 영국 랭카실르 워스잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William De Worthington(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elene De Charnock(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1250년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Denise de Halsall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1297년 영국 랭카실르 워스잉턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh De Worthington nasceu em 1238, em Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Worthington, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elene De Charnock, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Denise de Halsall antes 1250, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1297, em Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh De Worthington родился в 1238 г. в местности вортингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William De Worthington было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elene De Charnock, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Denise de Halsall перед 1250 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер в 1297 г. в местности вортингтон, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh De Worthington nació en 1238, en Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Worthington, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elene De Charnock, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Denise de Halsall antes de 1250, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1297, en Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
